sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n51836" key="ka/qicis" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">κάθιξις</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">εως</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n51836.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">arrival</tr_> at a point, <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">τῆς συναφῆς</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1764.tlg001:244:35" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Vett.Val.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">244.35</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
